decision.rationale: The plate motion_plates/head-turn-07.png honors the identity rule IR.sean.motion.head-turn-9-frame-sequence. As an intermediate rotation frame (frame 7 in the 9-frame sequence), it correctly progresses the head rotation from the front-facing midpoint (frame 5) to the final anchor-grade right-facing pose (frame 9). The eye-lead timing is preserved: the eyes have opened and shifted to the right-side turn target in frame 7, which leads the head's final rotation target in frame 9 by 2 frames. The hair silhouette is consistent with neighboring frames 6 and 8, showing no unauthorized drift. The back-of-skull silhouette is well-integrated and falls within the minor identity drift tolerances allowed for the intermediate rotation frames 06-08.
